overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit walking through a futuristic urban plaza with modern architecture. The character moves from a shaded walkway into an open plaza and approaches a United Colonies (UC) building entrance under a clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic plaza walkway with geometric canopy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the angular white building facade under the geometric canopy, approaching a corner seating area

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting on a bench near the building corner

entered.detail: modern angular building with geometric shadow patterns cast by overhead canopy
large metal truss structure forming a geometric pattern overhead
light-colored tiled plaza surface with geometric shadow patterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic building facade under a geometric metal canopy. The angular white building casts complex shadow patterns on the ground. Two NPCs sit on a bench near the upcoming corner, and distant blue structures are visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area under truss canopy with hotel and shopping district

events.description: character turns left to cross the open plaza area
moving from narrow walkway into wider plaza with UC building and hotel signage becoming visible

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking across the open plaza toward the UC building district, passing benches and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: NPC walking in the same direction toward the UC building area
NPC sitting on bench near the colorful mural wall

entered.detail: futuristic building with United Colonies signage and blue glass facade
large geometric abstract artwork with orange, blue, and white stripes on building wall
suspended sign reading HOTEL & SHOPPING in white text on teal background
sculpted trees with rounded canopies in the plaza distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a wide open plaza under the geometric canopy. The UC building with its distinctive signage becomes visible on the left, along with a colorful abstract mural. Pedestrians are scattered throughout the area, some walking and others sitting on benches. A hotel and shopping sign hangs overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: UC building entrance approach with modern glass facade

events.description: character turns left to face the UC building entrance directly

agents.ego_description: walking toward the UC building entrance, approaching the automatic glass doors

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near a service cart or kiosk
NPC walking past the UC entrance

entered.detail: large glass automatic entrance doors with metallic frames
illuminated UC logo sign above the entrance doors

segments.scene_description: The character turns to face the UC building entrance directly and walks toward the glass doors. The UC logo is prominently displayed above the entrance. The geometric canopy is now visible only in the distance behind, and the colorful mural has passed out of view. A few NPCs are near the entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded, angular walkway into a bright, open urban plaza leading toward a corporate entrance. It begins by tracking the character along a futuristic white building facade, where a geometric metal canopy casts complex shadow patterns across the ground. As the character turns left, the scene expands into a wide plaza filled with scattered pedestrians, revealing a colorful abstract mural and overhead shopping signs. The camera then shifts focus toward the United Colonies building on the left, moving past the mural and leaving the canopy behind in the distance. Finally, the movement culminates as the character walks directly toward the glass doors of the UC building, with the prominent corporate logo centered above the entrance.
